Customer.title: Customer
Customer.description: Represents a customer of the AgriCentral business.

id.description: Unique identifier for the customer entity.

Supplier.title: Supplier
Supplier.description: Represents a supplier to the AgriCentral business.

id.description: Unique identifier for the supplier entity.

contactName.description: Contact name at the supplier company.

itemIds.description: References to Items supplied. (Relationship: Supplier 1:N Item)

Item.title: Item
Item.description: Represents an item in the inventory, such as seeds, fertilizers, or equipment.

id.description: Unique identifier for the item entity.

category.description: The category of the item (e.g., Seeds for planning, Crops for harvesting).

stockLevel.description: Current stock level of the item.

Income.title: Income
Income.description: Represents a record of income for the business.

id.description: Unique identifier for the income record.

Expense.title: Expense
Expense.description: Represents a record of expenses for the business.

id.description: Unique identifier for the expense record.

Task.title: Task
Task.description: Represents a task assigned to a worker.

id.description: Unique identifier for the task entity.

status.description: Status of the task (e.g., To Do, In Progress, Completed).

workerIds.description: References to Workers. (Relationship: Worker M:N Task)

Worker.title: Worker
Worker.description: Represents a worker/user in the AgriCentral business.

id.description: Unique identifier for the worker entity, matches Firebase Auth UID.

email.description: Email address of the worker, used for login.

role.description: Role of the worker (e.g., Worker, Manager, Admin).

taskIds.description: References to Tasks assigned. (Relationship: Worker M:N Task)

Investment.title: Investment
Investment.description: Represents an investment record for the business.

id.description: Unique identifier for the investment record.

investorName.description: Name of the individual or entity making the investment.

equityDetails.description: Details of the equity associated with the investment.

id.description: Unique identifier for the transaction record.

definition.description: Stores customer profiles. Includes customerId as a parameter for individual customer access.

params.name: customerId
params.description: The unique identifier for the customer.

definition.description: Stores supplier profiles. Includes supplierId as a parameter for individual supplier access.

params.name: supplierId
params.description: The unique identifier for the supplier.

definition.description: Stores inventory items. Includes itemId as a parameter for individual item access.

params.name: itemId
params.description: The unique identifier for the item.

definition.description: Stores income records. Includes incomeId as a parameter for individual income record access.

params.name: incomeId
params.description: The unique identifier for the income record.

definition.description: Stores expense records. Includes expenseId as a parameter for individual expense record access.

params.name: expenseId
params.description: The unique identifier for the expense record.

definition.description: Stores task assignments. Includes taskId as a parameter for individual task access.

params.name: taskId
params.description: The unique identifier for the task.

definition.description: Stores worker profiles, which also represent application users. The document ID matches the Firebase Auth UID.

params.name: workerId
params.description: The unique identifier for the worker, matching their Auth UID.

definition.description: Stores investment records. Includes investmentId as a parameter for individual investment record access.

params.name: investmentId
params.description: The unique identifier for the investment.

definition.description: Stores transaction records. Includes transactionId as a parameter for individual transaction access.

params.name: transactionId
params.description: The unique identifier for the transaction.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore data structure is designed to manage entities for the AgriCentral application. It focuses on clarity, security, and scalability. Authorization Independence is achieved through path-based ownership for user-specific data and membership maps for collaborative data, eliminating the need for `get()` calls in security rules. Structural Segregation ensures that each collection has a homogeneous security posture.  For example, Customers, Suppliers, Workers, and Items are stored in top-level collections. Relationships between entities are managed through document references, as seen in the `customerId` field in the `incomes` and `transactions` collections, and `supplierId` in the `items` collection. This direct reference approach simplifies queries and maintains data integrity. To facilitate real-time data fetching from APIs, consider a server-side function triggered by Firestore writes to update an external cache or trigger downstream API calls based on the changes. This provides real-time updates and can be scaled with the application needs.
